decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a coupled transmission-model/data-assimilation framework to generate retrospective ensemble forecasts of West Nile virus outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete ensemble-forecasting application to historical West Nile virus data from Long Island.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a new ensemble forecast approach combining dynamical error correction with statistical filtering for influenza outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of an error-corrected ensemble forecasting approach.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an ensemble penalized regression algorithm using model averaging for near-real-time dengue forecasts.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and comparative evaluation of a new ensemble forecasting algorithm.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates error growth in an influenza ensemble forecast system and tests perturbations intended to improve ensemble spread and accuracy.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct performance analysis and optimization of an ensemble forecast system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an epidemiological prediction system to generate and test retrospective ensemble forecasts of childhood diarrhea outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete ensemble-forecasting application to childhood diarrhea in Botswana.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Recommends and structures ensemble forecast modeling for vaccine-trial site selection but does not itself introduce, apply, critique, validate, correct, or implement the forecasting method.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit guidance on using ensemble forecasts to design COVID-19 vaccine efficacy trials.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces an operational probabilistic dengue forecasting system driven by a superensemble of Bayesian spatiotemporal models.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of an operational ensemble forecasting system and evaluation framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates individual and multimodel ensemble COVID-19 mortality forecasts across time, locations, and horizons.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct comparative evaluation of ensemble forecast accuracy and uncertainty.

decisions.relationship_evidence: First proposes and validates an ensemble forecast system combining an SIR-type model with an ensemble adjusted Kalman filter.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological proposal of a real-time dengue ensemble forecast system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses simulation to compare an ensemble super learner with individual and naive algorithms for influenza-hospitalization prediction.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct evaluation of ensemble predictive performance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews influenza ensemble forecasting studies, identifies current shortcomings, and recommends directions for improving forecast skill and application.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Method-focused review offering limitations and research guidance for ensemble forecasting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes ensemble approaches combining mechanistic, statistical, and machine-learning models for short-term dengue forecasting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and retrospective/prospective evaluation of ensemble forecasting approaches.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a stacked ensemble model with non-negative least-squares weighting for influenza forecasting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a weighted ensemble forecasting model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies the Moving Epidemic Method to influenza surveillance data to monitor and harmonize epidemic intensity reporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete epidemic-monitoring application within Spain's sentinel surveillance system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies the Moving Epidemic Method to current virology data to predict seasonal influenza peak activity and peak week.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete real-time influenza monitoring and peak-prediction application in Scotland.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Validates the Moving Epidemic Method against other thresholds for prospective, nearly real-time RSV epidemic monitoring.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct validation of an epidemic-monitoring method using 12 seasons of surveillance data.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies the Moving Epidemic Method to long-term Spanish surveillance data to characterize influenza epidemic timing and intensity.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete epidemic-monitoring application across Spanish influenza seasons and age groups.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes monitoring real-time naive case-fatality rates as a method for identifying delayed or incomplete case confirmation during pandemics.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a real-time epidemic-monitoring indicator.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Monitors COVID-19 in Chile using reproduction numbers, underreporting, critical-bed burden, fatality ratios, and testing volume.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application of epidemic surveillance metrics during Chile's COVID-19 response.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts a prospective 10-year evaluation of a local influenza nowcasting method for epidemic onset, peak timing, and peak intensity.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Longitudinal performance evaluation of local epidemic nowcasting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Derives decomposable surveillance metrics for transmission speed, acceleration, jerk, and persistence under reporting limitations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of new epidemic-surveillance metrics.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a novel parametric regression model for real-time epidemic monitoring and short-term forecasting of COVID-19 indicators.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a reproducible nowcasting and short-term forecasting method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents an integrated statistical framework for characterizing epidemic cycles and predicting their duration and end.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of an epidemic-monitoring and prediction framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Performs mpox nowcasting and forecasting with EpiNow2 and retrospectively evaluates predictions across outbreak phases against a naive model.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct evaluation of operational outbreak nowcasts and forecasts.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Quantifies how underreporting and ascertainment delays restrict the timeliness and confidence of decisions based on epidemic surveillance data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal diagnosis of noise-induced limits in epidemic monitoring and intervention timing.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Derives and validates a novel analytic method for estimating, in real time, the reliability of end-of-epidemic declarations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a forecast-reliability and calibration method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares out-of-sample forecast accuracy, agreement, uncertainty, and underreporting estimates across five SARS-CoV-2 models.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct comparative evaluation of infectious-disease forecast performance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Formally evaluates how transmission heterogeneity and underreporting produce premature, delayed, or overconfident end-of-epidemic assessments.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct analysis of the reliability and calibration of epidemic-elimination assessments.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares eight probabilistic nowcasting approaches, evaluating bias, interval width, and ensemble performance in real time.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Preregistered comparative evaluation of nowcast accuracy and calibration.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assesses statistical post-processing and weighted ensemble methods using evaluation scores and forecast-interval coverage.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct evaluation of nowcast post-processing, weighting, and interval calibration.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a six-category modeling framework for antibiotic-resistance evolution and spread and analyzes model-structure sensitivity.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological framework for infectious-disease dynamics model classification and selection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates time-varying transmission and forecasts 30-day COVID-19 incidence in Italy's Marche region.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious-disease dynamics and forecasting application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an SEIR model and statistical workflow for early prediction of India's COVID-19 outbreak.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of an outbreak forecasting model and estimation procedure.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses reproduction-number estimation and probabilistic projections to predict COVID-19 incidence in Shahroud.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious-disease forecasting application using earlyR and projections.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an infection-spread simulation to study factors controlling predominance of novel SARS-CoV-2 variants.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application of an infectious-disease dynamics model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a branching-process and graph-neural-network approach to infer superspreading potential from early spatial spread.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a new epidemic-dynamics inference method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates multiple whole-genome analysis approaches for detecting known Salmonella outbreaks and compares them with PFGE.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct validation and limitation analysis of genomic outbreak detection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts prospective whole-genome surveillance in a public-health laboratory and demonstrates practical real-time outbreak-cluster detection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Operational implementation of genomic outbreak surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assesses whole-genome sequencing for E. coli O157 outbreak detection and compares its resolution and concordance with routine typing methods.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct evaluation of genomic outbreak-detection utility and limitations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a redesigned hospital outbreak-detection model led by routine prospective whole-genome sequencing and genetic-relatedness probabilities.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological proposal for sequence-first genomic outbreak detection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Validates whole-genome sequencing and two analysis pipelines against established methods across eight VTEC outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct performance validation of genomic surveillance and cluster detection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents a statistical model combining electronic medical-record exposures and whole-genome pathogen similarity to detect outbreaks and root causes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a genomic outbreak-detection framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses whole-genome surveillance to discover and investigate a previously unrecognized hospital VRE outbreak.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete genomic outbreak-detection application in interventional radiology.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a two-step genomic clustering approach with dynamically increased SNP thresholds for outbreak detection and investigation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a genomic outbreak-detection method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a statistical framework that optimizes genetic clustering thresholds for near-real-time outbreak detection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development for calibrating genomic cluster detection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reports prospective health-department use of whole-genome sequencing for Salmonella cluster surveillance and outbreak detection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Operational genomic surveillance implementation in Minnesota.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Provides MINTyper, a complete pipeline for rapid SNP-based detection of clonal outbreaks from short and long sequencing reads.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit software implementation of a genomic outbreak-detection method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a convolutional-neural-network method that detects HIV outbreaks from genomic distance matrices in real time.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and validation of a genomic outbreak-detection approach.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents and applies a framework for estimating how sequencing depth affects outbreak-detection resolution and delay.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct evaluation of genomic surveillance resolution and sampling limitations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates three whole-genome analysis schemes for clustering outbreak-associated versus sporadic Campylobacter isolates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct comparative validation of genomic outbreak-detection schemes.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates genomic and epidemiologic concordance of three WGS-based subtyping methods across nine Salmonella outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct performance evaluation supporting a national genomic surveillance method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Analyzes Listeria genomes from Costa Rica and identifies previously unrecognized outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete genomic outbreak-detection application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reports nationwide deployment and routine use of HIV molecular cluster detection by public-health departments.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Operational nationwide implementation of genomic cluster detection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses rapid benchtop whole-genome sequencing to identify hospital outbreaks and reconstruct probable transmission.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete genomic outbreak-detection and transmission-tracing application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates WGS SNP analysis for identifying Salmonella outbreaks and source traceback against epidemiologic definitions and PFGE.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct validation of genomic outbreak detection and source tracing.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reports nationwide real-time WGS combined with epidemiologic and product-traceback data for listeriosis outbreak surveillance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Operational national implementation of genomic outbreak detection and investigation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates core-genome SNP analysis for detecting Salmonella outbreaks and linking human cases to food and veterinary sources.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct validation of genomic outbreak detection and source linkage.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assesses HAVNet sequence data for geographical annotation, backtracing, and outbreak detection, including coverage and completeness limitations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct evaluation of a genomic database for outbreak and source-tracing uses.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses whole-genome sequencing to resolve geographic Salmonella clusters and identify a possible Greece-associated outbreak.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete genomic outbreak-detection and geographic-tracing application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses whole-genome sequencing to link a current infant Salmonella outbreak to an earlier outbreak and persistent manufacturing-facility contamination.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete genomic outbreak and source-linkage investigation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies WGS to detect Campylobacter patient clusters and match them to concurrent food and animal sources.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete outbreak-detection and source-tracing application in Denmark.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Links epidemiologic data with in-state whole-genome sequencing during a Massachusetts Salmonella outbreak investigation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete genomic outbreak-detection and control application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Implements WGS surveillance and EHR machine learning to detect an unrecognized hospital outbreak and identify its gastroscope transmission route.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Operational implementation combining genomic detection with source-route identification.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes and prospectively applies an integrated WGS framework for Salmonella outbreak detection and food-source tracing.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a genomic outbreak-detection and source-tracing framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops EDS-HAT, combining WGS surveillance with EHR machine learning to detect outbreaks and responsible transmission routes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and evaluation of an integrated genomic detection system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses retrospective whole-genome surveillance to identify three previously unrecognized Klebsiella outbreaks and characterize resistance spread.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete genomic outbreak-detection application in Philippine hospitals.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares three genomic alignment strategies for cluster ascertainment while detecting MRSA transmission clusters.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct evaluation of bioinformatic approaches used for genomic outbreak detection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Systematically reviews WGS surveillance and machine-learning outbreak investigations, documenting limited real-time use and narrow pathogen coverage.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Method-focused systematic review summarizing evidence, limitations, and implementation opportunities.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Provides DODGE, a freely available algorithm that dynamically selects genomic thresholds and detects investigation clusters over time.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit software implementation for automated genomic outbreak detection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Combines phylogenetic clustering with machine-learning source attribution to identify possible Salmonella outbreaks and likely bovine-meat sources.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete genomic outbreak-detection and source-attribution application in Ethiopia.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates Oxford Nanopore sequencing accuracy and clone-specific failure modes for Listeria outbreak detection and source attribution.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct validation and limitation analysis of genomic outbreak-investigation technology.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops dTOURS, a ratio-statistic method for excluding high-SNP-density regions during genomic outbreak analysis.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development within an automated pathogen-detection pipeline.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Provides squirrel, an open-source genomic analysis tool that distinguishes zoonotic from sustained human mpox outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit software implementation supporting genomic outbreak detection and interpretation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates neighbor typing with long-read sequencing for rapid relatedness prediction and outbreak-cluster detection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct accuracy and concordance evaluation of a rapid genomic outbreak-surveillance tool.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Pilots five WHO early warning indicators at nine Namibian ART sites and uses results to trigger program action.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete national application of HIV drug-resistance early warning indicators.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates whether adherence to drug-refill visits predicts virologic and immunologic failure as an early warning indicator.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct validation of a proposed HIV treatment early warning indicator.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Updates the broader WHO HIV drug-resistance strategy and names early warning indicator monitoring as one component, without itself introducing, applying, evaluating, correcting, or implementing the indicators.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Authoritative strategy update describing the place of early warning indicators in WHO HIVDR surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reports monitoring of WHO HIVDR early warning indicators across 2,107 clinics in 50 countries and explains how the indicators measure program factors.
decisions.lineage_evidence: WHO global methodological report explicitly describing and applying the developed indicator set.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies WHO HIVDR early warning indicators across 13 ART sites in six African countries and compares indicator performance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete multicountry application of the indicator set.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Pilots WHO HIV drug-resistance early warning indicators to assess ART service delivery in China.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete pilot application with planned national scale-up.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Pilots WHO HIV drug-resistance early warning indicator monitoring at two ART clinics in Papua New Guinea.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete clinic-level application followed by corrective actions.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Monitors WHO-recommended HIVDR early warning indicators at selected Zimbabwean ART clinics using routine data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete national ART-program application of the indicators.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies five standardized HIVDR early warning indicators across 40 ART sites in Cameroon using the WHO protocol.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete nationwide indicator-monitoring application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses five HIVDR early warning indicators to assess ART-program trends across Cameroonian clinics from 2008 through 2010.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete longitudinal application of the indicator set.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Scales WHO early warning indicator monitoring from nine to 33 Namibian ART sites and links results to public-health action.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete expanded national application of the indicators.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops individual-level predictors of virologic failure that merely complement the WHO population-level indicator system; these are not the exact HIV drug-resistance early warning indicator concept.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The record concerns a neighboring individual-level predictor set rather than lineage for the canonical WHO indicators.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Pilots WHO HIVDR early warning indicators at two South African clinics and scores performance against indicator targets.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete pilot application of the canonical indicators.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts a retrospective survey using four WHO early warning indicators across 35 Tanzanian clinics.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete population-level baseline application of the indicators.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses updated WHO guidance to collect and assess five HIVDR early warning indicators at 50 Namibian ART sites.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete national application of the revised indicators.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates five HIVDR early warning indicators at 15 Cameroonian ART sites under revised WHO guidelines.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete indicator-monitoring application across urban, rural, and different healthcare levels.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Tests associations and predictive discrimination between WHO early warning indicators and acquired HIV drug resistance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct validation of indicator association and predictive performance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Measures national retention-on-ART performance using its defined HIVDR early warning indicator thresholds in Cameroon.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete nationwide application of a canonical HIVDR early warning indicator.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Collects and compares WHO HIVDR early warning indicators across main and outreach ART sites in Namibia.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete national monitoring application across adult and pediatric services.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates prescribing, loss to follow-up, first-line retention, and drug interruptions as HIV resistance early warning indicators across 20 Ivorian treatment centers.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete retrospective application of the indicator framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Monitors seven WHO-recommended HIV drug-resistance early warning indicators across Thailand's ART program from 2009 to 2013.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete nationwide longitudinal application of the indicators.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Directly assesses operational barriers, system weaknesses, and proposed solutions for routine pediatric HIVDR early warning indicator monitoring.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Diagnostic study of implementation failures and opportunities for the indicator system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates operation, usefulness, sensitivity, and implementation gaps of an HIVDR early warning indicator surveillance system.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct system-level evaluation identifying training, navigation, abstraction, and feedback weaknesses.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assesses four HIV drug-resistance early warning indicators across 90 Ethiopian health facilities and six survey rounds.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete national and longitudinal application of the indicators.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts a nationally representative assessment of six WHO HIVDR early warning indicators at 304 Ugandan ART outlets.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete national application following revised WHO recommendations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates six WHO-recommended HIV drug-resistance early warning indicators across 68 care sites in all regions of Cameroon.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete nationwide application of the indicator set.
